summary: Tightened qd roadmap run validation so committed run records must keep UUID-shaped ids, timestamp-shaped lifecycle fields, typed optional metadata, valid optional git_sha and exit_code values, and safe existing repo-relative log paths.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: scripts/qd-report-check validates runs[] id values as lowercase UUID-shaped strings.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: evidence/m4-qd-run-content-contract/negative-smoke-malformed-id.log records the expected rejection for an uppercase UUID value.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: scripts/qd-report-check validates started_at and finished_at timestamp/nullability shape.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: evidence/m4-qd-run-content-contract/negative-smoke-bad-timestamp.log records the expected rejection for a malformed started_at value.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: scripts/qd-report-check rejects non-string optional command, provider, external_id, url, rationale, superseded_by, audit_kind, worktree_path, agent, summary, and log_path fields when present.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: evidence/m4-qd-run-content-contract/negative-smoke-non-string-optional-metadata.log records the expected rejection for object-valued provider metadata.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: scripts/qd-report-check rejects malformed optional git_sha and non-integer optional exit_code values.
scripts/qd-report-check rejects absolute, traversal, or missing optional log_path values when present.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: evidence/m4-qd-run-content-contract/negative-smoke-absolute-log-path.log, negative-smoke-traversal-log-path.log, and negative-smoke-missing-log-path.log record the expected log_path rejections.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: Existing qd reports and roadmap export pass the stricter check.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: evidence/m4-qd-run-content-contract/just-qd-reports-check.log records qd report validation passing with the stricter run checker.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: Linux validation evidence records qd-reports-check, nix develop -c just check, git diff --check, and focused negative smokes for malformed roadmap runs.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: The evidence directory contains positive validation logs, line-count evidence, and focused temporary-copy negative smoke logs for malformed roadmap runs.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: No macOS-specific validation is claimed or required.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: This node only changes repository qd metadata validation; realWorldValidation is marked not_required.

commandsRun.command: temporary-copy non-string optional run metadata smoke

realWorldValidation.evidence: Repository qd run ledger validation only; no product runtime, platform, media, cross-device, or macOS-specific behavior is claimed.
